title: melicope forbesii
intro: Melicope forbesii, also known as the Forbes' Melicope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having antiviral and antifungal properties. Melicope forbesii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable plant in Hawaiian folk medicine.
